content.en:
The ruins in front of him were not the same as the ruins he knew.

The ruins of the past were the places where various powerful forces or powerful people once lived, and after a long time, they became ruins.

However, this is not the case with this relic.

"So this is the Intersection Ruins!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before he came, he knew a little about the situation of this ruin, which belonged to the intersection ruins, that is, it was related to the intersection period.

If the same place has experienced the Convergence Period countless times, and the energy contained in the Convergence Period is strong enough, then it is possible to form a natural relic after a long time.

Such ruins are naturally formed, taking on various forms that cannot be predicted.

But in fact, most of the intersection period is not fixed, and the passage between the True Mountain Territory and the truncated Black Mountain does not belong to the intersection period, it can only be regarded as a intersection crack.

However, the gap in the sunset that once cut off the forbidden area belongs to the intersection period, and it is a fixed intersection period.

However, the gap in the glow is too small and the energy contained is too low to form a ruin.

Now.

The ruins in the core area of the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss look like a strange stone tower, this strange stone tower has no traces of external forces, and it is very large, half of it is in the Xuanqi Territory, but the other side has stepped into an unknown place, it should be somewhere outside the Xuanqi Territory.

"According to the intelligence, the target of the blood is directly here, could it be that he already knew that there were ruins formed here?"

Ye Tian guessed.

I'm afraid that's the truth, maybe there were signs of the formation of ruins here before the endless years, so after breaking the seal and recovering his strength, the Blood Ancestor came here.

I didn't expect that there would be ruins here.

In fact, after the ruins are formed, it is very difficult to find, and special methods are needed to channel the energy before the ruins can be completely revealed.

After that, the ruins will be transformed into treasures that will truly live forever.

And there is such a relic treasure land in the Xuanqi Territory, and there are even powerful forces that use the Ruins Treasure Land as their headquarters and easily step into places outside the Xuanqi Territory.

Whew!!!

A high-level immeasurable lifeform entered it, and Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and also went in directly.

......

After entering this ruins stone tower, Ye Tian received some information and learned about the information of this stone tower.

This stone pagoda has a total of eighteen floors, and there are nine floors inside the Genki Realm, and there are also nine floors outside the Genki Realm.

This stone pagoda is a relic pagoda, which is naturally formed, so there is no assessment, but high-level immeasurable lifeforms need to be approved by the relic stone pagoda if they want to benefit from the relic pagoda.

Recognition is about meeting standards.

For example, the requirement for this first layer of the Relic Stone Tower is that the flesh and blood body reaches a certain level in order to meet the standards of the Relic Stone Tower.

Since the first layer is not large, many high-level immeasurable lifeforms can see each other after they come here.

But Ye Tian didn't see the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, obviously the Raccoon Blood Ancestor was not on the first layer, but went to a higher level.

"Bloody guy isn't here!"

A top-notch third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform snorted coldly.

Ye Tian glanced at the other party and knew who this high-level immeasurable lifeform was.

The Great Ancestor of the Star Sea of Xuanqi Pavilion, which is also a Great Ancestor of the Xuanqi Realm, is extremely close to the fourth stage, and is known as one of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms that are most likely to step into the fourth stage.

Even in the Hurricane Territory, the reputation of the Star Sea Ancestor is not low.

Moreover, there is a list of immeasurable blood within the Xuanqi Pavilion, which is a list divided by the strength of the third-stage high-level immeasurable life forms, and it has also been recognized by many forces.

Among them, Xinghai Great Ancestor ranked sixth.

And the entire list is only included in a hundred, which shows how strong the strength of the Xinghai Great Ancestor is.

And this time, it was also led by the Xinghai Great Ancestor to hunt down and kill the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

The Blood Ancestor was not on the list of immeasurable blood, so his strength was definitely not as good as the Star Sea Ancestor.

......

"I'll go to the second floor first!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor stepped into a circle of light, and in an instant, a data appeared.

“3.6"

The Xinghai Great Ancestor didn't know what the significance of this number was, but after displaying this data, a blood-colored stone appeared and fell directly into the hands of the Xinghai Great Ancestor.

"Blood Holy Gold!"

The Xinghai Great Ancestor's face was shocked, this ruin stone tower actually casually gave away a piece of blood holy gold.

"Isn't this stone tower a relic, how can you send treasures?"

A high-level immeasurable lifeform was puzzled.

"Nonsense, how come the ruins can't provide treasures? This ruins are the birth of countless years of the intersection period, and when it is born, some resources from the original intersection period will be incorporated into it. The Nine Shadows Blood Abyss itself has a resource like Blood Saint Gold, but it is difficult to find, and it is even considered extinct. But now, it still exists, and there is one inside this ruin stone tower!"

After the Xinghai Great Ancestor obtained this piece of Blood Saint Gold, he was directly teleported into the second layer.

"Blood Holy Gold!"

Ye Tian had also vaguely heard of this substance, but he didn't know much, after all, he had only been a high-level immeasurable lifeform for a long time, and he was often in retreat, rarely participating in the communication between high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Therefore, he may not know too much about many treasures.

But soon, he learned about the usefulness of the Blood Saint Gold from other high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

That's to enhance flesh and blood!

This kind of enhancement is to enhance the strength of the physical body, and if there is enough blood holy gold, the high-level immeasurable lifeforms whose physical potential is not enough will be compensated.

Moreover, the Blood Saint Gold is recognized as the most suitable help for the improvement of the Infinite Body, and with a piece of Blood Sacred Gold, it is easy to raise the Superior Infinite Body from the beginner to the Xiaocheng realm.

This shows how high the value of the Blood Saint Gold is.

Swish!

Another high-level immeasurable lifeform stood in the circle of light.

This high-level immeasurable lifeform had probably condensed a dozen drops of immeasurable blood, and it was obvious that it had only only been long since it had broken through to the third stage.

“0.9"

A number appeared.

Immediately after, this high-level immeasurable lifeform showed a look of disappointment, obviously not up to the mark.

Wow!

This high-level immeasurable lifeform was directly kicked out by the Ruins Stone Tower.

And many high-level immeasurable lifeforms have also become dignified at this time, and they don't want to be kicked out of the first layer!
